# LeakSanitizer suppressions for the Linux address-sanitizer leg (Linux ASan enables LSan by
# default; macOS does not).
#
# corelibs-xctest's XCTMain allocates a handful of objects it never frees in every test-runner
# process — a fixed 432 bytes across 7 allocations, every frame inside XCTest ("Executed 0 tests":
# the empty XCTest half of a swift-testing bundle). Toolchain harness noise, not package code.
# Scoped to XCTest symbols, so a genuine leak in ADFoundation code still fails the leg.
leak:XCTest
